texto: What are the temples which Roman robbers have reared, - what are the towers in which feudal oppression has fortified itself...to the deep forests which the eye of God has alone pervaded, and where Nature, in her unviolated sanctuary, has for ages laid her fruits and flowers on His altar! What is the echo of roofs...or or aisles that pealed the anthems of painted pomp, to the silence that has reigned in these dim groves since the first fiat of Creation was spoken.
explicacao: Citação de Charles Fenno Hoffman sobre temas ligados a fe. “What are the temples which Roman robbers have reared, - what are the towers in which feudal oppre…” articula fe, god, nature em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e nature.
